# Handle Types
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AppConfiguration/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureAppConfigurationEmulatorResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AppConfiguration/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureAppConfigurationResource

# Enum Types
enum:Aspire.Hosting.AzureAppConfigurationRole = AppConfigurationDataOwner | AppConfigurationDataReader

# Capabilities
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AppConfiguration/addAzureAppConfiguration(name: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AppConfiguration/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureAppConfigurationResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AppConfiguration/runAsEmulator(configureEmulator?: callback) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AppConfiguration/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureAppConfigurationResource
